homeInfo.title: Audio Quality Evaluation
homeInfo.message:
Welcome to this audio quality evaluation test.

You will listen to 11 audio samples and answer 2 questions about each one.
Please use headphones and ensure you are in a quiet environment.

For each question, rate the audio on a scale from 1 (worst) to 7 (best).

Click the button below when you are ready to begin.

questions.name: Sample 1
questions.description:
Listen to the audio sample below and answer both questions.

CAPTION:
questions.caption: solo acoustic nylon string guitar playing in a fingerstyle Brazilian bossa nova style.

prompts.0: How correct is the information in the caption with relation to the audio? Rate on a scale from 1 (worst, incorrect information) to 7 (best, accurate information)
prompts.1: Does this description contain information that is unrelated to the audio clip? Rate on a scale from 1 (entire caption completely unrelated to the audio clip) to 7 (completely related)

questions.name: Sample 2
questions.description:
Listen to the audio sample below and answer both questions.

CAPTION:
questions.caption: This intense piece exemplifies extreme metal through its relentless rhythm and chaotic blend of death and grindcore elements. Distorted electric guitars, aggressive bass lines, and fast acoustic drums drive the track with a heavy, violent energy that evokes scenes from a mosh pit or high-stakes action sequences.
questions.id: /projects/adasp/mir/Internet_Archive_Dataset_v0/items/t/h/the-zacto-smile-music-from-the-zach-hill-pit-vol--2/Illiterate Mind Reader - The Zacto Smile (Music From The Zach Hill Pit Vol. 2) - 05 Ear Masturbation Face_00001.mp3

questions.name: Sample 4
questions.description:
Listen to the audio sample below and answer both questions.

CAPTION:
questions.caption: This instrumental track blends strong electronic and techno influences with a prominent bassline and a repetitive, driving beat. Atmospheric elements like vinyl crackle and white noise create a dark, immersive mood supported by synthesizers and computer-generated sounds. The piece avoids vocals to let the futuristic instrumentation take center stage, offering an energetic yet somber listening experience.

questions.name: Sample 5
questions.description:
Listen to the audio sample below and answer both questions.

CAPTION:
questions.caption: This instrumental techno track features a fast-paced rhythm driven by a powerful kick drum and deep, resonant synth bass. A loud synthesizer lead creates an energetic and intense atmosphere that feels perfect for the soundtrack of a video game or movie scene. The overall sound is futuristic and driving, suitable for high-energy settings like club environments or dangerous chases.

questions.name: About You
questions.description: Please tell us about your musical background.

fields.label: How many years of musical experience do you have?
Please describe your musical experience (instruments played, training, listening habits, etc.)
fields.placeholder: e.g. I've played piano for 10 years and studied music theory in college...
